generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategist, I've seen firsthand how our allies take advantage of U.S. security guarantees while doing the bare minimum themselves. We're footing the bill for Europe's defense while they enjoy our protection without lifting a finger. It's time we put America first and demand real burden-sharing. Our tax dollars should secure OUR interests, not subsidize foreign militaries. #AllianceCommitment #NationalSecurity
